nasb.text: Then he made the court of the priests and the great court and doors for the court, and overlaid their doors with bronze.

esv.text: He made the court of the priests and the great court and doors for the court and overlaid their doors with bronze.

cnv.text: 又建造祭司院、大院和大院的門；門都包上銅。

ccb.text: 他又建了祭司院、大院及大院的门，门都包上铜。
